footer.description: Track S&P 500 earnings dates, EPS estimates, and beat/miss rates.

home.faq1A: An earnings beat occurs when a company reports EPS (earnings per share) higher than analyst consensus estimates.
home.faq2Q: What does BMO and AMC mean?
home.faq2A: BMO means Before Market Open — the company reports earnings before the stock market opens. AMC means After Market Close — the company reports after trading ends.
home.faq3Q: How often is this data updated?
home.faq3A: EarningsPulse data is updated daily using multiple data sources including Alpha Vantage and Yahoo Finance.
home.faq4A: EPS surprise is the percentage difference between reported EPS and analyst estimates. A positive surprise means the company beat expectations.
